fields.description: The key concept, e.g., "Golden Ratio", "Fibonacci Sequence", "Double Helix"

fields.description: The surprising fact about this specific piece. Safe to show anywhere this piece appears (Journey, Explore, Library, P&P). Must be about the artwork itself, not a journey or day context. Journey-specific hooks live on dailyPrompt.curatorNote or journeyDay.encounterNote.
fields.name: artworkHook
fields.title: Artwork Hook (Encounter - 1st text)

fields.description: Optional MP3 narration of the artwork hook. Adds a small listen button.

fields.description: Optional. A traditional Catholic prayer shown in the expandable "Traditional Prayer" drawer on the Pray step of Visio Divina. Leave blank to use the built-in fallback prayer.

fields.description: Optional. Overrides the default Actio supporting instruction for this artwork. Leave blank to use the global Visio Divina default.

fields.description: e.g. "Ancient", "Early Church", "Medieval", "Modern" – for future use or labels

fields.description: Just the piece title, e.g. "Miserere Mei, Deus". Used for dedup — same composer twice is fine; same work twice is repetition.

fields.description: Journey title. e.g., "Light"
fields.name: title

fields.description: URL-safe. Source: title.
fields.name: slug

fields.description: Which theme this Journey explores
fields.name: theme

fields.description: Controls which section this journey appears in on the Journeys page. Standard goes in "Journeys"; Intro goes in "Where to Begin" with a START HERE badge; Companion goes in "Episode Companions" with companion card treatment.
fields.name: journeyType

fields.description: Companion journeys only. The name of the show or series this journey pairs with. Example: "Seeking Beauty". Appears in the dark teal strip at the top of the companion card.
fields.name: showName

fields.description: Companion journeys only. The episode identifier shown on the companion card strip. Example: "Episode 1".
fields.name: episodeLabel

fields.description: What the seeker will explore over 7 days. Shown on Journey card.
fields.name: description

fields.description: Cover image for Journey card. High-res.
fields.name: heroImage

fields.description: Default: 10. Shown as "~10 min/day".
fields.name: estimatedMinutesPerDay

fields.description: Toggle on when all 7 days are ready.
fields.name: isPublished

fields.description: Display order in Journey list.
fields.name: order
fields.title: Display Order

fields.description: References to journeyDay documents. Add existing journeyDay docs or create new ones. Each day follows: Open → Encounter → Reflect → Connect → Go Deeper.
fields.name: days

fields.description: The intended total number of days for this journey. Used for the progress bar and day count even before all days are built. Leave blank to auto-calculate from built + planned days.
fields.name: totalDays
fields.title: Total Days (full arc)

fields.description: Day numbers and titles for days not yet built in Sanity. These appear greyed out and non-tappable in the app, so users can see the full journey arc before all days are published.
Must match the intended day slot (e.g. 2 for Day 2).
fields.name: dayNumber

fields.description: The title users will see in the greyed-out row.
fields.name: dayTitle
plannedDays
fields.title: Planned Days (coming soon)

fields.description: The journey this day belongs to.
fields.name: journey

fields.description: e.g., "The First Light" or "What Darkness Teaches"
fields.name: dayTitle

fields.description: ALWAYS required. The visual anchor for the day. Min 1200px.
fields.name: openImage
fields.title: Opening Image

fields.description: Brief opening text (~1 min read). Sets the day's frame.
fields.name: openText
fields.title: Opening Text

fields.description: Optional MP3 narration of the opening text. Adds a small listen button.
fields.name: openTextAudio
fields.title: Opening Text — Narration Audio

fields.description: The primary content for this day (3–5 min encounter).
fields.name: encounterContent

fields.description: Optional editorial guidance. e.g., "Listen with your eyes closed for the first minute."
fields.name: encounterGuidance

fields.description: Interpretive layer specific to this day's content type. Sacred art → symbolism/iconography. Literature → close reading. Music → listening guide. Landscape → ecological/geological insight. Thinkers → intellectual context. Pattern & Proof → plain-language explanation. Watch & Listen → viewing guide. Food & Wine → craft tradition.
fields.name: encounterNote
fields.title: Encounter Note (Look Closer)

fields.description: Optional MP3 narration of the Look Closer text. Adds a Listen button at the top of the Look Closer section.
fields.name: encounterNoteAudio
fields.title: Encounter Note — Narration Audio

fields.description: Optional audio pairing for this day. Create the Auditio document first, then reference it here.
fields.name: auditio
fields.title: Auditio (Audio Suggestion)

fields.description: Optional philosophy + scripture pairing for this day. Connects the encounter to broader intellectual and spiritual tradition.
A quote from a philosopher, thinker, or writer (may be secular). e.g., Plato, Bergson, Socrates.
fields.name: philosophyQuote

fields.description: Full attribution. e.g., "Plato, Republic (Allegory of the Cave)"
fields.name: philosophySource

fields.description: Scripture pairing for this day.
fields.name: scriptureVerse

fields.description: e.g., "1 Corinthians 13:12"
fields.name: scriptureReference

fields.description: Why this pairing works. How the philosophy and scripture echo each other and connect to the day's encounter.

lectio

fields.description: Optional MP3 narration of the reflection questions. Adds a Listen button on the Reflect step.

fields.description: One sentence threading to tomorrow. e.g., "Tomorrow: what happens when the light goes away?"

fields.description: Optional tradition reflections for this day.

of.title: Reference to tradition reflection (church fathers, saints & popes)

fields.name: goDeeper

fields.description: The date this prompt appears. One per day. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.
fields.name: date

fields.description: The featured content for this day.
fields.name: content
fields.title: Featured Content

fields.description: Optional: a poetic editorial title for this day (e.g. "God Does Not Die" for the Sacred Heart day). Shown prominently above the artwork. Different from the work title, which lives on the linked content item. Added June 7, 2026 (PP-DAYTITLE-01).
fields.name: dayTitle
fields.title: Editorial Day Title

fields.description: Optional: shown on the Today page card as the teaser. Not shown inside the prompt practice.
fields.name: promptQuestion

fields.description: Optional: why this was chosen for today. The human editorial voice.

fields.description: Optional MP3 narration of the curator note. Adds a small listen button.
fields.name: curatorNoteAudio
fields.title: Curator Note — Narration Audio

fields.description: Optional: scripture, or a philosophy + scripture pairing. Philosophy first, scripture second. If philosophyText is provided, both are shown as a pairing.
A philosopher reaching toward a truth that scripture names. Plato, Aristotle, Marcus Aurelius, Seneca, Boethius, etc. Leave blank for scripture-only.
fields.name: philosophyText
fields.title: Philosophy Quote (optional — shown first)

fields.description: e.g. "Plato, Republic — Allegory of the Cave" or "Marcus Aurelius, Meditations IV.3"

text

fields.description: An invitation to carry something into the day. One concrete, gentle action.

fields.description: Optional: if a Journey deepens this prompt, link it here. Shown as a quiet CTA at the bottom of the prompt.

fields.name: theme

fields.description: Order in the splash sequence (1, 2, 3…). Lower numbers shown first.

fields.description: A short label for this screen in Studio (e.g. "Brand Identity"). Not shown to users.
fields.name: screenTitle
fields.title: Screen Title (admin only)

fields.description: Content blocks rendered top-to-bottom. Choose one block per piece of content; visual treatment is fixed by block type.
Brand wordmark, e.g. "KALLOS". Rendered in Montserrat uppercase, wide tracking.
fields.name: text

fields.description: Pronunciation guide, e.g. "kal · os". Rendered in Cormorant italic, small.
fields.name: text

fields.description: Optional note for editors. Not displayed.
fields.name: note
fields.title: Note (admin only)

fields.description: Display quote. Rendered in Cormorant italic, large. Quotation marks are added automatically.
fields.name: text

fields.description: Screen heading. Rendered in Cormorant italic, large.
fields.name: text

fields.description: Body paragraph. Rendered in Open Sans light, line height 1.8.
fields.name: text

fields.description: Short closing line. Rendered in Montserrat verdigris (#5F7A6B), small. Optional — leave empty to keep the block as a placeholder for future text without rendering anything on the screen.
fields.name: text

fields.description: Small caps label at the top of the card (e.g. "Pause & Ponder").
fields.name: label

fields.description: One-sentence description for the card.
fields.name: body

fields.description: e.g. "Start here →". Rendered as a gold filled button.
fields.name: label
fields.title: Button Label

fields.description: App route to navigate to (e.g. /journeys/beauty-truth-and-goodness or /prompt). When tapped, marks onboarding complete.
fields.name: linkPath

fields.description: e.g. "See today's Pause & Ponder →". Rendered as a small text link.
fields.name: label
fields.title: Button Label

fields.description: App route to navigate to. When tapped, marks onboarding complete.
fields.name: linkPath
blocks

fields.description: The italic Cormorant prompt shown centered on the Visio Divina Action step. The current hardcoded value is "How will you live this out?" — used as the default for all artworks unless overridden per-content-item.
fields.name: defaultActioHeadline
fields.title: Default Actio headline

fields.description: The supporting prompt shown below the headline on the Action step. Current hardcoded value: "Ask yourself and God: How will you apply what you've received in prayer to your life?"
fields.name: defaultActioInstruction
fields.title: Default Actio instruction

fields.description: The instruction sentence above the Traditional Prayer drawer on the Pray step. Current hardcoded value: "Respond to God in prayer—thanksgiving, intercession, or simply conversation about what you notice."
fields.name: defaultPrayerPrompt
fields.title: Default Pray prompt

fields.description: The traditional prayer shown in the expandable drawer when the artwork does not have its own `traditionalPrayer` value. Replaces the previously hardcoded FALLBACK_PRAYER in PrayClient.tsx.
fields.name: defaultTraditionalPrayer

fields.description: Attribution for the default prayer above. Hidden in app when blank.
fields.name: defaultTraditionalPrayerSource
fields.title: Default Traditional Prayer — Source

fields.description: The fallback Actio shown on any P&P day where the dailyPrompt's own actio field is blank. Edit here to change the voice across every default-actio day at once. Replaces the previously hardcoded "Carry one image of beauty with you today. Let it be a question, not an answer."
fields.name: defaultActio

fields.description: e.g., "Seeking Beauty in Vatican City"

fields.description: e.g., "Vatican City" (shown in navigation)

fields.description: e.g., "Vatican City, Rome, Italy"
